rows.description: Mem: £ 43.15.00 being part of the above mentioned Ballance Due to the Rectr was taken out of the Treasury & paid by Mr Edgcumbe Subrectr Janr yth 1734/5. The remaining 2s 3/4 is allowed in the next years acco.
rows.notes: Adopted gpt-5-mini's monetary values. The description was heavily revised based on visual verification due to several transcription differences: 'pa' to 'paid', 'subseqmt' to 'Subrectr', added '/5' to the date '1734/5', and 'a/c' to 'acco'. This line is an entry as it states a specific financial transaction amount.
rows.english_description: Note: £43.15.00 is part of the balance due to the Rector that was taken from the Treasury and paid by Mr Edgcumbe, the Subrector in January 1734/5. The remaining 2 shillings and 3 pence is allowed in next year's accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note: £43.15.00 is part of the balance due to the Rector that was taken from the Treasury and paid by Mr Edgcumbe, the Subrector in January 1734/5. The remaining 2s 3d is allowed in next year's accounts.
